message:
🐛 Fix unreadable green line — make dev mode indicator legible (#4095)

* 🐛 Remove broken OpenSSF Scorecard badge (repo not enrolled)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix unreadable green line — make dev mode indicator legible (#4080)

The dev mode bar was 5px tall with 6px text, making it look like a
CSS bug rather than a purposeful indicator. Now 20px tall with 10px
legible "Development Mode" text on a green background.

Fixes #4080

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
